text: The air is filled with possibility and curiosity. The glass walls and modern furnishings suggest an environment of innovation and focus, while the vivid, playful display about research and development invokes a sense of excitement about discovery. I feel a quiet thrill—an invitation to observe, question, and contribute my own thoughts to the ongoing conversation of ideas. Surrounded by the unfinished, the experimental, I am content to dwell in ambiguity, sustained by the collective optimism of this creative space.
